perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic title card featuring a character and the text 'Costco 每週特價速報' over a background of store shelves. (2) A series of rapid cuts showcase various products inside a Costco warehouse, starting with Iberian pork belly rolls and Skippy peanut butter. Hands are occasionally seen pointing at or holding the products. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of items including energy jellies, instant noodles, chewing gum, snacks, bottled water, tea, laundry detergent, pet food, and various wines, all displayed on their respective warehouse shelves. (4) The video maintains this fast-paced product-reveal format until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice introduces the segment with a friendly, rapid-fire greeting: '好市多每週特價速報，記得追踪我們哦'. (2) As each product appears, the male narrator quickly reads out the product name and its sale price in a rhythmic, professional tone. (3) The audio consists of a continuous stream of vocal information layered over the persistent, high-tempo BGM. No ambient store noise or specific SFX are audible over the studio-quality voiceover and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: '好市多 每週特價速報 08/18 - 08/24 記得追蹤我們' appearing on the opening screen with an energetic tone. (2) Functional Text: For every product, a consistent overlay appears showing 'Product Name' (e.g., 西班牙 伊比利豬五花肉卷), 'Original Price' (e.g., 原價599/KG), 'Discount amount' (e.g., -120), and 'Sale Price' (e.g., 特價479/KG). (3) Branding: Specific brand names like 'SKIPPY', 'AIRWAVES', 'CALBEE', 'KIRKLAND', 'KITKAT', and 'CORONA' are featured prominently in the text overlays.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price showcase sequence -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male presenter based on voice and hands visible in frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Only the hands of the presenter are visible, appearing to be a male wearing casual attire.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large warehouse-style retail store (Costco) with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and bulk packaging of various consumer goods.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-speed digital circular or shopping guide, designed to inform viewers of the specific weekly deals available at Costco Taiwan between August 18th and August 24th. By combining rapid visual proof of the products with clear price information and an energetic narration, it aims to drive foot traffic to the store and increase social media engagement for the creator.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed price comparisons, specific dates for the deals, and the prominent use of the Costco name and various brand logos.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed voiceover style, consistent yellow-and-white text styling for price reveals.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a 'short-form catalog' aesthetic common in retail influencer content, prioritizing information density over cinematic storytelling to suit the fast-scrolling habits of mobile users.
